title: AST Warrant Arrest: Voznesenka [AK25033107]
summary: On 6/20/2025, Alaska State Troopers in Anchor Point were on a routine patrol in Voznesenka when they located Lara Basargin (37 years old) who had an outstanding felony arrest warrant. Lara attempted to run, but was apprehended following a short scuffle with AST. Lara was remanded to Homer Jail and held on $500 bail.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: SIWO Forecast – June 20, 2025
summary: Assessment of Current Ice Conditions Relevant to Distribution and Access of Walrus Click the name of each community below to view more frequently updated and detailed information from the National Weather Service. Synopsis : Unsettled weather will begin Friday night (June 20th) as a low pressure in the southern Bering Sea sends a series of fronts across the Seward Peninsula and into the Bering Strait. There are chances for scattered rain showers everyday through the week as the low pressure continues to sit in the Bering Sea. The heaviest rain is looking to be Wednesday night and into Thursday. Winds will generally be 10 to 20 mph (8 to 17 kts) through the week. Areas of fog are anticipated in the mornings whenever there are onshore winds. Near St. Lawrence Island The only sea ice left around the island is between...

title: AST Warrant Arrests, False Report: FAIRBANKS [AK25059606]
summary: On 06/20/2025 at 0308 hours a Trooper conducted a traffic stop on two bicyclists. One of the bicyclists, Kiona Volkheimer, gave the Trooper a false name and date of birth. Volkheimer was arrested for false report and her three arrest warrants. Gary Galbreath, the other bicyclist, was arrested for his two arrest warrants. Both were transported to FCC without incident.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: two bicyclists

title: Chugach Celebrates Legislative Victory for Alaska Native Elders
summary: Once signed into law, this legislation will ensure that ANCSA-related benefits are not unfairly counted as income, a long-standing issue that has impacted our Elders’ access to Social Security and other federal programs. “Our Elders have given so much,” stated Chugach Chairman Sheri Buretta. “This l...
